notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate Skill with the query-handler recipe in single mode. Coverage: simple @QueryHandler import swap (bike-rental derived), queryName removal with payload record introduction (bike-rental), QueryUpdateEmitter constructor→method-param migration (bike-rental), @ProcessingGroup+@MetaDataValue migration (heroes-of-ddd derived), rejected pure dispatcher.

evals.name: simple-import-swap
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. BikeStatusHandler is a Spring @Component with two @QueryHandler methods: findAll(FindAllBikes query) and findOne(FindBikeById query). Both methods already use typed payload classes. Apply the query-handler recipe use-case 01: swap the @QueryHandler import from org.axonframework.queryhandling.QueryHandler to org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.annotation.QueryHandler. Method bodies, parameters, and all other annotations stay identical. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: AF5 QueryHandler import; method signatures and bodies unchanged; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-handler

evals.name: named-query-removal
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. RentalBikeQueryProjection has three @QueryHandler methods each with queryName attribute: findAll() with queryName="findAll" (no params), findAvailable(String bikeType) with queryName="findAvailable", findOne(String bikeId) with queryName="findOne". Apply the query-handler recipe use-case 02: (1) swap QueryHandler import to org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.annotation.QueryHandler, (2) add import org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.annotation.Query, (3) introduce three inner records: @Query(name="findAll") record FindAllQuery() {}, @Query(name="findAvailable") record FindAvailableQuery(String bikeType) {}, @Query(name="findOne") record FindOneQuery(String bikeId) {}, (4) update method signatures: findAll(FindAllQuery ignored), findAvailable(FindAvailableQuery query), findOne(FindOneQuery query), (5) update method bodies: replace bare param references bikeType→query.bikeType() and bikeId→query.bikeId(), (6) remove all queryName attributes from @QueryHandler. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: AF5 QueryHandler import; three payload records introduced with @Query annotations; queryName attributes removed; method bodies updated; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-handler

assertions.text: findAvailable body updated to use query.bikeType()

evals.name: query-update-emitter-migration
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. BikeStatusSubscriptionProjection has QueryUpdateEmitter as a constructor field and an @EventHandler method on(BikeRegisteredEvent event) that calls `updateEmitter.emit(q -> "findAll".equals(q.getQueryName()), bikeStatus)`. Apply the query-handler recipe use-case 03: (1) remove private final QueryUpdateEmitter updateEmitter field, (2) remove QueryUpdateEmitter updateEmitter from constructor parameters and body, (3) add QueryUpdateEmitter updateEmitter as a method parameter to the @EventHandler on() method, (4) update emit() from 2-arg to 3-arg: `updateEmitter.emit(FindAllBikes.class, q -> true, bikeStatus)`, (5) swap QueryUpdateEmitter import to org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.QueryUpdateEmitter, (6) swap @EventHandler import to org.axonframework.messaging.eventhandling.annotation.EventHandler, (7) swap @QueryHandler import to org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.annotation.QueryHandler. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: QueryUpdateEmitter field removed; injected as method param in @EventHandler; emit() updated to 3-arg class-based form; all imports updated; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: QueryUpdateEmitter injected as method param in on()
AF5 EventHandler import on the touched method
Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-handler

evals.name: processing-group-metadata-migration
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. GetAllDwellingsQueryHandler is annotated with @ProcessingGroup("Read_GetAllDwellings_QueryCache") and has an @EventHandler method with a @MetaDataValue("gameId") String gameId parameter. Apply the query-handler recipe use-case 04: (1) replace @ProcessingGroup("Read_GetAllDwellings_QueryCache") with @Namespace("Read_GetAllDwellings_QueryCache"); add import org.axonframework.messaging.core.annotation.Namespace; remove import org.axonframework.config.ProcessingGroup. (2) replace @MetaDataValue("gameId") with @MetadataValue("gameId"); add import org.axonframework.messaging.core.annotation.MetadataValue; remove import org.axonframework.messaging.annotation.MetaDataValue. (3) swap @QueryHandler import to org.axonframework.messaging.queryhandling.annotation.QueryHandler. (4) swap @EventHandler import to org.axonframework.messaging.eventhandling.annotation.EventHandler (this method is being modified). Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: @Namespace replaces @ProcessingGroup; @MetadataValue replaces @MetaDataValue; all imports updated; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-query-handler

evals.name: rejected-no-query-handler
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. PaymentDispatchService is a @Service that injects QueryGateway and dispatches queries via queryGateway.query(...) but has NO @QueryHandler annotation. The query-handler recipe's Applicable predicate 4 must reject this class (no @QueryHandler found — suggest query-gateway recipe). The source MUST stay byte-identical — no imports changed, no annotations added. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Pure dispatcher rejected; source untouched; Result: ⏭️ Rejected noting query-gateway as the appropriate recipe.
expectations: Notes name query-gateway as routing target
Source untouched: QueryGateway field still present

assertions.text: Notes name query-gateway as routing target
